shrink"><div class="pc-text-raw font-bold ellipsis">7-1  日期格式化</div></div><div class="flex space-x-2 justify-center items-center"><button class="pc-button pc-button-text pc-color-primary disabled cursor-pointer" tabindex="0" type="button" disabled=""><div class="pc-text pc-color-inherit whitespace-nowrap pc-trs-normal shrink no-grow"><div class="pc-icon"><svg aria-hidden="true" center;">下一题</div><div class="pc-icon"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="pc-icon-raw"><use xlink:href="#pat-right"></use></svg></div></div></button></div></div></div><div class="flex flex-col overflow-auto flex-1"><div class="grow shrink splitArea_DF4tO" data-split-area="true" style="--margin-left: 200px; --margin-right: 425px;"><div class="left_rtQmv"><div class="flex flex-col h-full scroll"><div class="sticky top-0 flex bg-bg-light flex-none border-b-2 border-bg-base z-10"><button class="pc-button py-2 px-4 !shadow-none bg-bg-base pc-button-text pc-sm pc-active-light cursor-pointer" tabindex="0" type="button"><div class="pc-text pc-active-light whitespace-nowrap pc-trs-normal pc-gap-4 shrink no-grow"><div class="pc-text-raw text-sm ellipsis" style="text-align: center;">题目描述</div></div></button></div><div class="p-4 md:px-6 space-y-4 scroll"><div class="space-y-4"><div><div class="flex flex-wrap space-x-2 items-center"><span class="text-darkest font-bold text-lg">7-1 日期格式化</span><div class="rounded-xl bg-bg-light bg-opacity-10 px-3 py-1 inline-block whitespace-nowrap flex-none"><div class="flex items-center space-x-1"><div class="pc-text pc-color-light pc-gap-4"><div class="pc-text-raw text-xs">分数 10</div></div></div></div></div><div class="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-4 pb-3 bd-bottom-1"><div class="flex flex-wrap gap-x-4 gap-y-1 grow"><button class="pc-button pc-button-text pc-xs pc-color-lightest cursor-pointer" tabindex="0" type="button"><div class="pc-text pc-color-inherit whitespace-nowrap pc-trs-normal pc-gap-4 shrink no-grow"><div class="pc-text-raw text-xs ellipsis" style="text-align: center;">全屏浏览</div></div></button><button class="pc-button hidden md:flex pc-button-text pc-xs pc-color-lightest cursor-pointer" tabindex="0" type="button"><div class="pc-text pc-color-inherit whitespace-nowrap pc-trs-normal pc-gap-4 shrink no-grow"><div class="pc-text-raw text-xs ellipsis" style="text-align: center;">切换布局</div></div></button></div><div class="flex flex-wrap shrink gap-x-5 gap-y-1"><div class="pc-text pc-color-lightest pc-gap-4"><div class="pc-text-raw text-xs">作者 陈越</div></div><div class="pc-text pc-color-lightest pc-gap-4"><div class="pc-text-raw text-xs">单位 浙江大学</div></div></div></div></div><div class="bg-bg-base space-y-4"><div class="hyphens-auto flex-1 min-w-0 break-words" lang="en"><div class="rendered-markdown dark:rendered-markdown-invert"><p>世界上不同国家有不同的写日期的习惯。比如美国人习惯写成“月-日-年”，而中国人习惯写成“年-月-日”。下面请你写个程序，自动把读入的美国格式的日期改写成中国习惯的日期。</p>
<h3 id="输入格式：">输入格式：</h3>
<p>输入在一行中按照“mm-dd-yyyy”的格式给出月、日、年。题目保证给出的日期是1900年元旦至今合法的日期。</p>
<h3 id="输出格式：">输出格式：</h3>
<p>在一行中按照“yyyy-mm-dd”的格式给出年、月、日。</p>
<h3 id="输入样例：">输入样例：</h3>
<div data-code="" data-lang="in"><div class="codeEditor_CHvdZ readOnly_GnZrN" style="font-size: 0.875rem;"><div class="cm-editor ͼ1 ͼ2 ͼo"><div class="cm-panels cm-panels-top" style="top: 0px;"><div class="cm-panel"><div class="flex space-x-3 px-3 py-2 empty:hidden text-lightest toolbar_SkQeK bd-bottom-1"><div class="flex mr-2 language_E7263"><div class="pc-x mr-2 font-mono font-black text-[0.75rem] text-lightest select-none transition-colors duration-500 languageName_cZYHa">[ in ]</div></div><button class="pc-button action_ZO2qN pc-button-text pc-xs pc-color-inherit pc-active-primary cursor-pointer" tabindex="0" type="button"><div class="pc-text pc-color-inherit pc-active-primary whitespace-nowrap pc-trs-normal pc-gap-4 shrink no-grow"><div class="pc-text-raw text-xs ellipsis" style="text-align: center;">复制内容</div></div></button><button class="pc-button action_ZO2qN pc-button-text pc-xs pc-color-inherit pc-active-primary cursor-pointer" tabindex="0" type="button"><div class="pc-text pc-color-inherit pc-active-primary whitespace-nowrap pc-trs-normal pc-gap-4 shrink no-grow"><div class="pc-text-raw text-xs ellipsis" style="text-align: center;">格式</div></div></button><button class="pc-button action_ZO2qN pc-button-text pc-xs pc-color-inherit pc-active-primary cursor-pointer" tabindex="0" type="button"><div class="pc-text pc-color-inherit pc-active-primary whitespace-nowrap pc-trs-normal pc-gap-4 shrink no-grow"><div class="pc-text-raw text-xs ellipsis" style="text-align: center;">全屏</div></div></button></div></div></div><div class="cm-announced" aria-live="polite"></div><div tabindex="-1" class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-gutters cm-gutters-before" aria-hidden="true" style="min-height: 40.5023px; position: sticky;"><div class="cm-gutter cm-lineNumbers"><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 0px; visibility: hidden; pointer-events: none;">9</div><div class="cm-gutterElement cm-activeLineGutter" style="height: 24.5023px; margin-top: 8px;">1</div></div><div class="cm-gutter cm-foldGutter"><div class="cm-gutterElement" style="height: 0px; visibility: hidden; pointer-events: none;"><span title="Unfold line">▸</span></div><div class="cm-gutterElement cm-activeLineGutter" style="height: 24.5023px; margin-top: 8px;"></div></div></div><div spellcheck="false" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" writingsuggestions="false" translate="no" contenteditable="false" style="tab-size: 4;" class="cm-content" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" aria-readonly="true" aria-placeholder="" aria-autocomplete="list"><div class="cm-line cm-activeLine">03-15-2017</div></div></div></div></div></div>

class="pc-icon pc-color-light"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="pc-icon-raw pc-xl"><use xlink:href="#pat-submissions"></use></svg></div><div class="pc-text pc-color-light pc-gap-4"><div class="pc-text-raw text-xs break-normal text-balance">提交列表</div></div></a><a tabindex="0" href="/problem-sets/2035686362741522432/exam/rankings" class="supports-[anchor-name:none]:!bg-transparent class="row-start-1 row-end-2 col-start-1 col-span-full"><div class="bg-bg-base bd-1"><div class="flex space-x-4 items-center h-14 pl-2 pr-4"><div class="flex items-center min-w-0 md:min-w-[14rem] href="/problem-sets/2035686362741522432/exam/overview"><div class="pc-text pc-color-inherit pc-active-primary whitespace-nowrap pc-trs-normal pc-gap-4 grow shrink"><div class="pc-text-raw text-lg ellipsis" style="text-align: left;">实验二 选择结构程序设计 (电气工程25级)</div></div></a></div><div class="flex space-x-2 items-center"><div class="rounded-xl bg-blue-500 bg-opacity-10 px-3 py-1 inline-block whitespace-nowrap flex-none"><div class="flex items-center space-x-1"><div class="pc-text pc-color-primary pc-gap-4"><div class="pc-text-raw text-xs">答题中</div></div></div></div><div class="px-2 py-1 outline outline-1 outline-border rounded"><span class="space-x-2 flex items-center"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="pc-icon-raw w-[1em] h-[1em] text-lightest" style="vertical-align: -0.15em;"><use xlink:href="#pat-stopwatch-start"></use></svg><span class="text-darkest font-mono">2 天</span></span></div><div class="relative flex items-center"><button class="pc-button bg-bg-light rounded-full p-2 pc-button-text pc-xl pc-color-light pc-active-normal cursor-pointer" tabindex="0" type="button"><div class="pc-text pc-color-inherit pc-active-normal whitespace-nowrap pc-trs-normal pc-gap-6 shrink no-grow"><div class="pc-icon pc-active-normal"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="pc-icon-raw pc-lg"><use xlink:href="#pat-announcement"></use></svg></div></div></button></div><button class="pc-button bg-bg-light rounded-full p-2 pc-button-text pc-xl pc-color-light pc-active-normal cursor-pointer" tabindex="0" type="button"><div class="pc-text pc-color-inherit pc-active-normal whitespace-nowrap pc-trs-normal pc-gap-6 shrink no-grow"><div class="pc-icon pc-active-normal"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="pc-icon-raw pc-lg"><use xlink:href="#pat-gear"></use></svg></div></div></button><div class="flex gap-x-4 relative"><div class="inline-block cursor-pointer" type="button" id="radix-:r7:" aria-haspopup="menu" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed"><div class="flex items-center space-x-2"><div class="relative w-8 h-8 rounded-full outline outline-white"><div class="bg-primary w-full h-full rounded-full text-white text-center text-sm flex items-center justify-center">用户</div></div><div class="space-y-0"><div class="text-normal text-base">用户1709</div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="LoadingBar_iY6lY" style="width: 100%; height: 0px;"></div><div class="notifications-wrapper"></div><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" class="hover:no-underline flex justify-center align-items-center fixed bottom-16 -left-6 w-12 h-12 bg-bg-base shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] rounded-full opacity-70 z-10 transition-all hover:left-0 hover:opacity-100" href="mailto:feedback@pat-edu.com?subject=拼题A 反馈 1998560736387239936&amp;body=https://pintia.cn/problem-sets/2035686362741522432/exam/problems/type/7"><div class="pc-icon pc-color-dark"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="pc-icon-raw pc-lg"><use xlink:href="#pat-report"></use></svg></div></a></div><script>/* 改动此文件需要进行IE浏览器测试 */
/* eslint-disable no-alert */
/* eslint-disable prefer-template */
/* eslint-disable no-var */
var startTime = Date.now()
var deprecationMsgCN = '本站已停止支持您正在使用的 IE 相关内核或其他老旧版本的浏览器。请使用新版 Edge，Chrome，Firefox，QQ 浏览器或其他现代浏览器。'
var deprecationMsgEN = 'We have ceased the support for legacy browsers that you \'re currently using. Please switch to more recent versions of Microsoft Edge, Google Chrome, Firefox or QQ Browser.'

var ieDeprecationHTML = '<div id="unsupported-browser">'
  + '<svg width="100%" height="300px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1500 1500" fill="#d93e36">'
    + '<path d="M512 64c247.381333 0.106667 447.893333 200.618667 448 448-0.106667 247.381333-200.618667 447.893333-448 448-247.381333-0.106667-447.893333-200.618667-448-448 0.106667-247.381333 200.618667-447.893333 448-448z m152.96 234.666667L512 451.626667 359.04 298.666667 298.666667 359.04 451.626667 512 298.666667 664.96 359.04 725.333333 512 572.373333 664.96 725.333333 725.333333 664.96 572.373333 512 725.333333 359.04 664.96 298.666667z"  />'
  + '</svg>'
 + ' <p>'
    + deprecationMsgCN
  + '</p>'
  + '<p>'
   + deprecationMsgEN
  + '</p>'
+ '</div>'
var style = document.createElement('style')
style.innerHTML = '#unsupported-browser p {'
  + 'text-align: center;'
  + '}'

function isIE() {
  var myNav = navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase()

  if ('ActiveXObject' in window) {
    return true
  }
  if (typeof window.Proxy === 'undefined') {
    return true
  }
  // https://stackoverflow.com/questions/65259661/detecting-edge-legacy-browser-not-edge-chromium
  if (myNav.indexOf('edge') > 0) {
    return true
  }

  return (myNav.indexOf('msie') > 0) ? parseInt(myNav.split('msie')[1], 10) : false
}

const CHROME_LIMIT_VERSION = 66
const FIREFOX_LIMIT_VERSION = 69

function isBrowserVersionLow() {
  const { userAgent = '' } = navigator
  const getBrowserVersion = (browser) => {
    try {
      return Number(userAgent.match(new RegExp(browser + '/([\\d.]+)'))[1].split('.')[0])
    } catch (e) {
      return Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER
    }
  }
  if (userAgent.indexOf('Chrome') > -1) {
    return getBrowserVersion('Chrome') < CHROME_LIMIT_VERSION
  }
  if (userAgent.indexOf('Firefox') > -1) {
    return getBrowserVersion('Firefox') < FIREFOX_LIMIT_VERSION
  }
  return false
}

function isOmsClient() {
  return navigator.userAgent.indexOf('OMSClient') !== -1
}

if (!isOmsClient() && (isIE() || isBrowserVersionLow())) {
  document.head.appendChild(style)
  const ele = document.createElement('div')
  ele.innerHTML = ieDeprecationHTML
  document.body.insertBefore(ele, document.body.firstChild)
} else {
  // eslint-disable-next-line func-names
  window.PRELOAD_GLOBAL_ERROR_HANDLER = function (msg) {
    if (msg.toString() === 'NS_ERROR_STORAGE_CONSTRAINT') {
      alert('您的浏览器缓存已满，请清理缓存后再试。')
    } else if (msg.toString() !== 'Script error.') {
      alert(msg + '\n\n' + deprecationMsgCN + '\n' + deprecationMsgEN + '\n\n' + navigator.userAgent)
    }
    if (window.services && window.services.assert) {
      window.services.assert.assert(Date.now() - startTime < 10000, 'PRELOAD_GLOBAL_ERROR_HANDLER', window.CLEAR_DEPRECATION_ERROR_HANDLER + msg + navigator.userAgent)
    }
  }

  window.onerror = window.PRELOAD_GLOBAL_ERROR_HANDLER
}

const PUBLIC_PATH_CACHE_KEY = 'PUBLIC_PATH_CACHE'
const PUBLIC_PATH_CACHE_TTL_KEY = 'PUBLIC_PATH_CACHE_TTL'

try {
  const queryStrings = location.search.slice(1).split('&')
  if (!queryStrings.find(qs => qs === 'proxyCDN=1')) {
    const url = localStorage.getItem(PUBLIC_PATH_CACHE_KEY)
    const time = localStorage.getItem(PUBLIC_PATH_CACHE_TTL_KEY)
    if (url && time) {
      const lastUpdate = parseInt(time, 10)
      const now = Date.now()
      if (now - lastUpdate < 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 ) { // 1 day in ms
        const urlObj = new URL(location.href)
        urlObj.searchParams.set('proxyCDN', '1')
        location.href = urlObj.toString()
      }
    }
  }
} catch (e) {
  console.error(e)
}

    setTimeout(function () {
      document.querySelectorAll('#splash [aria-hidden="true"]').forEach(function (ele) {
        ele.ariaHidden = 'false'
      })
    }, 5000)</script><script async="" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-ZHCNP8KECW"></script><div class="container_NUWn9 hidden"><div class="hint_pB8O9 empty_r0_vE"></div></div><div class="fixed z-30 py-4 px-6 mt-3 right-10 left-10 md:left-auto bottom-4 bg-bg-base rounded-lg shadow-xl space-y-2 opacity-0 transition-all translate-y-[-2] duration-300 invisible"><div class="pc-text whitespace-nowrap"><div class="pc-text-raw">检测到新版本，请<button class="pc-button mx-2 before:content-[''] before:absolute before:bottom-[0.125rem] before:inset-x-[-0.25rem] before:h-1.5 before:bg-warning before:rounded before:z-[-1] before:opacity-40 before:transition-all hover:before:bg-bg-normal hover:before:opacity-100 pc-button-text pc-md pc-color-normal pc-active-warning inline cursor-pointer" tabindex="0" type="button"><div class="pc-text pc-color-inherit pc-active-warning whitespace-nowrap pc-trs-normal shrink no-grow"><div class="pc-text-raw text-md ellipsis" style="text-align: center;">重新加载</div></div></button>页面</div></div><div class="flex justify-end"><button class="pc-button pc-button-text pc-sm pc-color-primary cursor-pointer" tabindex="0" type="button"><div class="pc-text pc-color-inherit whitespace-nowrap pc-trs-normal pc-gap-4 shrink no-grow"><div class="pc-icon"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="pc-icon-raw pc-md"><use xlink:href="#pat-bell-off"></use></svg></div><div class="pc-text-raw text-sm ellipsis" style="text-align: center;">不再提醒</div></div></button></div></div></body>
